subject: Project pulse: falcon execution in Canberra | Nikola Tesla | Q1 review | INIT-2737
body: Following yesterday's call, the falcon effort in Canberra needs prompt confirmation. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Prepare a fallback plan if integration testing slips beyond schedule. The retrospective section links this stream to lessons from Nikola Tesla and Pablo Picasso. Reference initiative INIT-2737. Please add your comments before tomorrow morning. Tracking tags: planning, ops.
